Import Bulk Products


Import Bulk Products
{% csrf_token %}
{{ form.products_file }}
{% for field in form %} {% if field.errors %} {% for error in field.errors %}
  • {{ error }}
    • {% endfor %} {% endif %} {% endfor %}

    Follow the steps below to prepare your CSV file:

    • barcode - Unique barcode for each product
    • product_name - Name of the product
    • product_desc - Short description about the product
    • full_specification - Full specification about the product (Optional)
    • hsn_number - HSN number for the product (Optional)
    • model_number - Model Number for the product (Optional)
    • purchase_price - Purchase price of the product
    • regular_price - MRP of the product
    • sales_price - Sale price of the product (Optional)
    • unit_type - Unit type of the product (pcs for Pieces),(kg for Kilograms),(g for Grams),(l for Liters),(ml for Milliliters),
      (m for Meters), (m2 for Meter Square)
    • stock - No. of products in stock
    • image - Image of the product
    • gallery_image_1 - Product Gallery Image 1 (Optional)
    • gallery_image_2 - Product Gallery Image 2 (Optional)
    • gallery_image_3 - Product Gallery Image 3 (Optional)
    • category - Category name
    • subcategory - Subcategory name
    • tax_category - Tax category name
    • tax_percentage - Tax percentage

    Important Note: Before importing the CSV file, ensure that the fields for image, gallery_image_1, gallery_image_2, gallery_image_3 contain valid URLs. Upload these images first into the Media Library, copy their links, and paste them into the respective fields in the CSV file to ensure the products are imported correctly.

    Download Sample CSV
    {% endblock %}
